summary:
The EQ-5D assesses health-related quality of life across five dimensions but does not consist of exactly five distinct questions; instead, each dimension includes multiple items rated on a scale. Therefore, labeling it a "five-question assessment" is incorrect despite its name suggesting otherwise.  

\boxed{B} no

Therefore, labeling it a "five-question assessment" is incorrect despite its name suggesting otherwise.  

\boxed{B} no. Answer choice: B
